{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20749_1
|class_id=20749
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20749_2
|fame=15
|art=19
|fth=27
|civ=19
|tech=10
|ss1=Gene Research Free Speedup +3m<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +1<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss2=Gene Research Free Speedup +6m<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +2<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss3=Gene Research Free Speedup +9m<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss4=Gene Research Free Speedup +9m<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500
|ss7=Gene Research Free Speedup +9m<br>Per 30 Time Chests opened, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Chests Opened: 1500/1500<br> (Awakened)
}}
